message:
feat(agent-mail): integrate MCP-based agent communication system

Adds integration with the Agent Mail MCP server for inter-agent coordination,
enabling meta_skill to participate in multi-agent workflows with message
passing, inbox management, and acknowledgment tracking.

New module src/agent_mail/mod.rs (274 lines):

AgentMailClient struct:
- mcp: McpClient - JSON-RPC 2.0 client for MCP protocol
- project_key: String - Project identifier for message routing
- agent_name: String - This agent's registered identity

Core methods:
- connect(endpoint, project_key, agent_name): Establish MCP connection
- fetch_inbox(limit, include_bodies): Retrieve pending messages
- acknowledge(message_id): Mark message as read/acknowledged
- send_message(to, subject, body): Send message to another agent
- register_agent(program, model, task): Register agent identity

InboxMessage struct:
- id: i64 - Unique message identifier
- subject: String - Message subject line
- from: String - Sender agent name
- body_md: Option<String> - Markdown body (if include_bodies=true)
- importance: String - Priority level (low/normal/high/urgent)
- ack_required: bool - Whether acknowledgment is expected
- created_ts: String - ISO-8601 timestamp

MCP protocol implementation:
- JSON-RPC 2.0 request/response handling
- Method dispatch for fetch_inbox, acknowledge_message, send_message
- Error handling with MsError integration
- Connection pooling and retry logic

New CLI command src/cli/commands/inbox.rs:
- `inbox list`: Display pending messages with priority highlighting
- `inbox read <id>`: Show full message content
- `inbox ack <id>`: Acknowledge message receipt
- --urgent-only: Filter to high-priority messages
- --json: Machine-readable output

Configuration (src/config.rs):
- AgentMailConfig struct with environment variable support:
  - AGENT_MAIL_ENDPOINT: MCP server URL
  - AGENT_MAIL_PROJECT: Project key
  - AGENT_MAIL_AGENT: Agent identity name
- Integration with AppConfig loading

Use cases:
- Receive coordination messages from orchestrating agents
- Acknowledge task assignments and report completion
- Send status updates to monitoring agents
- Participate in multi-agent skill development workflows

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
